disk.name: FreeDOS Hard Disk
disk.description: ~320MB bootable hard disk with FreeDOS 1.4, 230 utilities, archivers, editors, disk tools, and the kernel/FreeCom/mTCP source code under C:\SOURCE\ for GPL §3 compliance. License texts in C:\LICENSE\, credits in C:\CREDITS.TXT.

disk.name: FreeDOS Starter
disk.description: ~32MB bootable FreeDOS with essential utilities, DPMI support, networking (mTCP), and GPL source code under C:\SOURCE\. Small download, good for getting started.

disk.name: FreeDOS Boot Floppy (qxDOS)
disk.description: 1.44MB FreeDOS boot floppy with attribution and credits files baked in (README.TXT, CREDITS.TXT, SOURCE.TXT, LICENSE\GPL2.TXT). Derivative work of the upstream FreeDOS 1.4 boot floppy; same kernel and FreeCom.

disk.name: MS-DOS 4.0 Hard Disk
disk.description: 64MB bootable Multitasking MS-DOS 4.0 BETA from microsoft/MS-DOS, plus the production MS-DOS 4.00/4.01 source archive in C:\SOURCE\MSDOS40.ZIP. MIT License. Copyright (c) IBM and Microsoft Corporation.

disk.name: MS-DOS 4.0 Boot Floppy
disk.description: 1.44MB bootable Multitasking MS-DOS 4.0 BETA boot floppy with IBMBIO.COM, IBMDOS.COM, COMMAND.COM, and core utilities from microsoft/MS-DOS v4.0-ozzie. MIT License. Copyright (c) IBM and Microsoft Corporation.

disk.name: FreeDOS 1.4 LiveCD
disk.description: Official FreeDOS 1.4 installer and live CD. Boot from CD-ROM to install FreeDOS or run directly. Includes all standard packages.

disk.name: FreeDOS 1.4 LegacyCD
disk.description: FreeDOS 1.4 installer for older hardware. Same packages as LiveCD but uses a different boot method compatible with more systems.

disk.name: FreeDOS 1.3 LiveCD
disk.description: Official FreeDOS 1.3 installer and live CD. Stable release with full package set.

disk.name: Simtel MS-DOS Archive (1999)
disk.description: The Simtel archive: thousands of MS-DOS utilities, programming tools, editors, file managers, and shareware games. August 1999 edition.

disk.name: Simtel MS-DOS Archive (1996) Disc 1
disk.description: Simtel MS-DOS archive, September 1996 edition, disc 1 of 2. Utilities, programming tools, drivers, and shareware.

disk.name: Simtel MS-DOS Archive (1996) Disc 2
disk.description: Simtel MS-DOS archive, September 1996 edition, disc 2 of 2.

disk.name: Power DOS (Walnut Creek, 1995)
disk.description: Walnut Creek Power DOS CD-ROM, July 1995. Curated collection of DOS utilities, tools, and shareware from the golden age of DOS.

disk.name: Best of Walnut Creek (1996)
disk.description: Best of Walnut Creek CD-ROM, February 1996. Highlights from one of the largest shareware and freeware archives of the 1990s.

disk.name: MS-DOS Archives Vol. 1 (Walnut Creek)
disk.description: Walnut Creek MS-DOS Archives Volume One. Large collection of DOS programs, utilities, and source code.
